mainEntity.name: Do I get paid while recovering from work injury in Bountiful Utah?
mainEntity.text: Do I get paid while recovering from work injury in Bountiful Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, temporary total disability benefits at 66 2/3% of average weekly wage, up to state max, starting after 3-day waiting period waived if off 14+ days.

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah comp covers lost wages, medical, but caps apply. Employers may contest light duty. In Bountiful, track all time lost; attorneys negotiate higher settlements considering future earning loss. Insurers undervalue—don't settle early.

name: Wage Replacement Bountiful Injuries
description: Yes, temporary total disability benefits at 66 2/3% of average weekly wage, up to state max, starting after 3-day waiting period waived if off 14+ days.
